title: MRMPROBS tutorial dataset for MS-DIAL5
author: Buyantogtokh, Bujinlkham
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: This dataset is designed for use with MRMPROBS and its accompanying tutorial . It contains: A raw data file ( *.lcd ) of lipid extraction from mouse muscle tissue acquired using Shimadzu QTOF LCMS-9030 with DIA-MS-OAD (Data Independent Acquisition-Mass Spectrometry-Oxygen Addition Dissociation) method Output files ( 20231204_QC_* and AlignmentResult_2024_01_16_17_* ) generated by MS-DIAL analysis Additional files utilized in the MRMPROBS tutorial video To reproduce the tutorial results: Load the project in MS-DIAL: Open the MRMPROBS_tutorial.mdproject file. Please note that it is necessary that the MS-DIAL analysis output files ( 20231204_QC_* and AlignmentResult_2024_01_16_17_ ) are also located in the same folder. Follow the tutorial instructions: Proceed through the tutorial steps to analyze the data and achieve the same results. Sample information: Methyl- tert -butyl ether (MTBE) lipid extraction from C57BL/6J mice Experiment parameter: The precursor isolation window of the DIA method is written in swath_dictionary.txt . Nexera X2 UPLC system (Shimadzu, Kyoto, Japan) was used as the LC system. Lipids were separated using an Imtakt UK-C18 MF column (50 mm × 2 mm:3 μm) (Imtakt, Kyoto, Japan). The MS detection of lipids was performed using a QTOF-MS (LCMS-9030; Shimadzu, MA, USA).
